ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication or study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Reference identifier for the publication */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients in the study */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the publication (e.g., journal, conference, internal report) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the publication */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the category */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_categories_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevalence_rates" (
  "prevalence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevalence rate entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease category */,
  "prevalence_rate" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of the disease category in the publication (can be a range) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prevalence rate */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the prevalence rate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the prevalence rate entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the prevalence rate entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the prevalence rate entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the prevalence rate entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prevalence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES disease_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_disease_categories" (
  "pub_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-disease category mapping */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mapping */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the mapping */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_disease_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_disease_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES disease_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_disease_categories_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_disease_categories_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the log entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the log entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the publication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., methodological, ethical, financial) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the metadata entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the metadata entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
